what: Persist local vault metadata to the SQLite database
why: The vault must be recorded in the DB so the rest of the app can find and manage it

success_handling.criteria: Row inserted into vaults table with vault_type='local', git_url=NULL, branch=NULL

error_handling.action: Return DB_WRITE_FAILED error and delete the directory created in step 02

decisions.reason: vault_type='local', git_url=NULL, branch=NULL stored in DB
decisions.rationale: Distinguishes local vaults from git vaults; null git fields signal no sync capability
